subject: VPN disconnects every 10 minutes
description: Since the last update, my VPN drops every 10 minutes. I'm on Windows 11 using GlobalProtect. I've tried reinstalling but the issue persists.
reasoning: VPN drops every 10 minutes indicates a connectivity problem.
resolution_notes: Assigned to Network Operations for Network/Connectivity (High urgency).
email_body:
Hi Charlie,

Thank you for reaching out about your VPN issue.  
Your ticket (INC005) has been assigned to our Network Operations team.  
A specialist will follow up shortly to resolve the disconnects.  

No action is needed from you right now. We appreciate your patience and will keep you updated.

Best regards,  
IT Support Team
